rationale.R1.1: Identifies several conceptual issues and proposes tighter framing, partially supported.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior works but does not map comprehensively against nearest works.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims but lacks confidence marking for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope with minor drifts.
rationale.RX.4: Harm-free but identifies limited harmful patterns in original.
